install_choose_cluster_hint: Choose a cluster to load PackageManifests.
install_conflict_tooltip: Multiple plugin-managed OperatorPolicies match this package/catalog; verify on the cluster.
install_helper_filter_package: Case-insensitive. The same package can appear multiple times (one row per catalog).
install_intro_before_link: Browse PackageManifests on a managed cluster (same catalog as oc get packagemanifest on that cluster), then create an OperatorPolicy so the governance controller can install the operator there. See
installed_alert_load_body: Ensure you have access to the MCE managedclusterproxy path and the MCE console plugin is enabled.
installed_empty_body_clusters: No Ready ManagedClusters were found and no subscriptions were read on the hub session. Check permissions and ManagedCluster resources.
installed_empty_body_subs: Ready clusters did not return OLM subscriptions via the proxy, or none are installed.
installed_empty_title_clusters: No managed clusters and no hub subscriptions
installed_err_annotation_missing: This OperatorPolicy is no longer marked as created by this plugin (annotation missing). Reload the page.
installed_external_title: OperatorPolicy not created from this console (e.g. hub Policy or GitOps). Edit via governance or YAML.
installed_intro: OLM Subscriptions per managed cluster: installed operators (by namespace), CSV phase, approval mode, pending upgrades via InstallPlans, and OperatorPolicy references when the subscription is governance-managed.
installed_migration_intro: This subscription was not installed through OperatorPolicy (manual OLM install). To move it under governance, add the opt-in label below. Then create a matching OperatorPolicy on the cluster (e.g. from Install operators) or use automation that watches this label.
installed_migration_success: Migration label set on {{namespace}}/{{name}}. Create a matching OperatorPolicy (Install operators page) or let your cluster automation react to the label.
installed_modal_governance_body: If this OperatorPolicy was created from this console, it is removed first, then the Subscription — so governance does not recreate the install. If the policy is not plugin-managed, delete or change it on the cluster if the subscription comes back.
installed_modal_hub_body: This OperatorPolicy was not created from this plugin (for example it is reconciled from a hub Policy or other automation). Prefer changing or removing the parent policy from RHACM / GitOps; deleting only the Subscription here may be enforced again.
installed_modal_uninstall_body: Delete the OLM Subscription resource {{subscription}} on cluster {{cluster}}? This starts operator removal; CSVs and CRDs may remain until cleaned up by OLM or admins.
installed_uninstall_success_both: OperatorPolicy {{policyNs}}/{{policyName}} removed, then Subscription {{subNs}}/{{subName}} removed. The operator may finish uninstalling; CRDs can remain depending on OLM settings.
installed_uninstall_success_policy_kept: Subscription {{subNs}}/{{subName}} removed. The OperatorPolicy ({{policyNs}}/{{policyName}}) was not removed (not created from this console or not reachable); delete it on the cluster if the subscription reappears.
installed_uninstall_success_sub_only: Subscription {{subNs}}/{{subName}} removed. The operator may finish uninstalling; CRDs can remain depending on OLM settings.
overview_chart_csv_aria_desc: Subscriptions with ClusterServiceVersion in Succeeded phase versus other phases
overview_chart_gov_aria_desc: Subscriptions referenced by OperatorPolicy versus standalone OLM
overview_chart_ref_aria_desc: Subscriptions with an OperatorPolicy reference annotation versus without
overview_chart_upgrade_aria_desc: Subscriptions with a pending upgrade or InstallPlan action versus up to date
overview_intro: High-level view of OLM subscriptions across Ready managed clusters and the hub: CSV health, pending upgrades, governance (OperatorPolicy), and counts per cluster. Open Installed Operators for the full table.
policy_modal_aria_og_ns: OperatorGroup namespace (same as subscription install namespace)
policy_modal_err_sub_config_not_object: Subscription config must be a YAML mapping (object).
policy_modal_helper_allowed_versions: Comma- or space-separated CSV names. In shared namespaces, include versions for all co-installed operators if needed.
policy_modal_helper_custom_config: Optional: resources, env, volumeMounts, volumes merged under spec.subscription.config.
policy_modal_helper_og_intro: Optional. If unset, the controller may create an OperatorGroup in the subscription namespace when none exists. The OperatorGroup namespace always matches the Subscription install namespace field above.
policy_modal_helper_og_ns: Always the same as the Subscription install namespace.
policy_modal_helper_policy_ns: Namespace of the OperatorPolicy CR. Defaults to the managed cluster name when creating.
policy_modal_helper_sub_cfg_yaml: YAML merged under spec.subscription.config (resources, env, volumeMounts, volumes, …).
policy_modal_helper_sub_ns: OLM subscription target namespace. Shared namespaces can share InstallPlans across operators. If you configure an OperatorGroup below, its namespace is always the same as this value.
policy_modal_submit_err_catalog: Catalog source and source namespace are required.
policy_modal_submit_err_name_ns: Policy name and namespace are required.
